description: Bottom of a legal document. Location: Might be Palermo (פלרם), but this word is very faded. Dated: Elul 4904 AM = August 1144 CE. Settlement between [...] bt. ʿIwāḍ and her husband Shelomo b. Mevorakh. No details of the settlement. Witnesses: the parnas Avraham b. Aharon the cantor; Barakāt b. ʿAmram; Moshe b. Sahlān. (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
